title: Portal Plus
description: A simple mod that adds a new way to reach the End in the late game.
body:
# Portal Plus
A simple mod that adds a new way to reach the End in the late game.

## The portal is ignited with dragon breath

![portalplus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53f3aabf7bb353cf85604023ce1248427af46dd6.png)

![portalplus_02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9039c17de03496eca286ee1d3937f233b8ba6813.png)

### Dependencies:     
Fabricloader: ">=0.15.3"               
Fabric-api [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

### Resources
[https://github.com/kyrptonaught/customportalapi](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/customportalapi)
